import resume from '../assets/pdf/Bharath_Chavala_Software_Engineer.pdf'
import image from '../assets/images/BharathChavala.JPG'
export const headerData = {
    name: 'Bharath Chavala',
    title: "Software Engineer",
    desciption:"I believe in Programming isn't about what you know, it's about what you can figure out. - Chris Pine",
    image: image,
    resumePdf: resume
}
